name: tutorial-script-variants
title: Script Variants
description: Chain script steps with different runtimes — JavaScript, Python, and Bash. Each step reads the previous step's output and transforms it further. Demonstrates runtime selection, data passing between scripts, and the script config block.

steps.name: Enter Numbers
steps.description: Provide a comma-separated list of numbers to analyze.

steps.name: Parse (JavaScript)
steps.description: Parse the comma-separated string into a sorted array of numbers.

steps.name: Compute Stats (Python)
steps.description: Compute basic statistics — mean, median, min, max, standard deviation.

script.inlineScript:
import json, statistics

with open('/output/input.json') as f:
    data = json.load(f)

numbers = data.get('steps', {}).get('parse-js', {}).get('numbers', [])

if not numbers:
    result = {'error': 'No numbers provided'}
else:
    result = {
        'count': len(numbers),
        'min': min(numbers),
        'max': max(numbers),
        'mean': round(statistics.mean(numbers), 2),
        'median': round(statistics.median(numbers), 2),
        'stdev': round(statistics.stdev(numbers), 2) if len(numbers) > 1 else 0,
        'numbers': numbers
    }

with open('/output/result.json', 'w') as f:
    json.dump(result, f)

steps.name: Format Report (Bash)
steps.description: Format the statistics into a human-readable text report.

script.inlineScript:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

DATA=$(cat /output/input.json)
COUNT=$(echo "$DATA" | jq '.steps["stats-python"].count')
MIN=$(echo "$DATA" | jq '.steps["stats-python"].min')
MAX=$(echo "$DATA" | jq '.steps["stats-python"].max')
MEAN=$(echo "$DATA" | jq '.steps["stats-python"].mean')
MEDIAN=$(echo "$DATA" | jq '.steps["stats-python"].median')
STDEV=$(echo "$DATA" | jq '.steps["stats-python"].stdev')

REPORT="Number Analysis Report\n======================\nCount:  ${COUNT}\nMin:    ${MIN}\nMax:    ${MAX}\nMean:   ${MEAN}\nMedian: ${MEDIAN}\nStdDev: ${STDEV}"

jq -n --arg report "$REPORT" '{report: $report, format: "text"}' > /output/result.json
